FLOW.COMMENT: getActiveKnowns - get transaction knowns from the TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE table

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: getActiveTransaction - get the entire active transaction and its content for publishing - this service is called when we are going to/from a distributed instance

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT *,TO_CHAR(WORKFLOW_STEPS) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS1-15 FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller

Values.value: SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, TRANSACTION_START_UTC, STATUS, STATUS_MESSAGE, STATUS_DATE, KNOWN_USER_ID, KNOWN_PROTOCOL, KNOWN_SERVER_NAME, KNOWN_REMOTE_IP, KNOWN_REMOTE_PORT, KNOWN_LOCAL_IP, KNOWN_LOCAL_PORT, KNOWN_FOLDER, KNOWN_FILENAME, KNOWN_MIMETYPE, KNOWN_SENDER, KNOWN_RECEIVER, KNOWN_MESSAGE_TYPE, KNOWN_ENCODING, KNOWN_SUBJECT, KNOWN_ACCEPT_SERVICE, ACCEPT_DOCUMENT_SIZE, HASH1, SENDER_APP, SENDER_DOC_FORMAT, SENDER_PROTOCOL, RECEIVER_APP, RECEIVER_DOC_FORMAT, RECEIVER_PROTOCOL, DOC_SUBTYPE, DOC_TYPE, BULK_DOC_COUNT, WORKFLOW_NAME, SENDER_TP_ALIAS, SENDER_TP_NAME, SENDER_BUSINESS_NAME, RECEIVER_TP_ALIAS, RECEIVER_TP_NAME, RECEIVER_BUSINESS_NAME, DOCUMENT_ID, MESSAGE_ID, ORDER_NUM, OTHER_NUM1, OTHER_NUM2, OTHER_NUM3, OTHER_NUM4, RULENUM, CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP, DELIVER_DOCUMENT_SIZE, DELIVERY_ATTEMPTS, TRANSACTION_VARS, SEC_ACCEPT, SEC_DISCERN, SEC_BROKER, SEC_MAP, SEC_QUEUED, SEC_SLEEP, SEC_DELIVER, SEC_DB, SEC_IDLE, SEC_TOTAL, REMEDIATION, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 1 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS1, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 4001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS2, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 8001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS3, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 12001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS4, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 16001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS5, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 20001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS6, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 24001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS7, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 28001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS8, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 32001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS9, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 36001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS10, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 40001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS11, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 44001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS12, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 48001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS13, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 52001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS14, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 56001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS15 FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller
0 or the sessionid of the caller

INVOKE.NAME: sRows != 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0512 No record found for sFwTransactionid='%sFwTransactionid%'

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller

Values.value: FE0512 No record found for sFwTransactionid='%sFwTransactionid%'

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller

MAP.COMMENT: set STATUS_MESSAGE to blank - also blank WORKFLOW_STEPS* if any are null

MAP.COMMENT: combine the 15 workflow step fields into a single WORKFLOW_STEPS field and drop them from dbOutput

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller
0 or the sessionid of the caller

INVOKE.COMMENT: replace 'null's with "" to avoid having to run a bunch of individual blankifnull calls later

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller
0 or the sessionid of the caller

MAP.COMMENT: put WORKFLOW_STEPS back into the dbOutput record

RETRY.COMMENT: find the highest content number so we can broker that content

BRANCH.COMMENT: exit the REPEAT loop when we find content
